Prior-Work Check

Why: Prior work exists in the target repo; extend the existing surfaces with a vNext/repair packet instead of building parallel ones.

followUpTasks.body:
Prior-Work Check verdict: extend_existing for Laser Engrave Market v1.
Authorizes a vNext/repair packet only (not a new App Build Packet).

## Extend (do not rebuild)
- product-marketplace: component supabase/migrations/20251129224507_create_maker_marketplace_system.sql - Extend supabase/migrations/20251129224507_create_maker_marketplace_system.sql for "Product listings, orders, checkout for engraved goods"; do not create a parallel component.

- product-marketplace: component src/components/CheckoutForm.tsx - Extend src/components/CheckoutForm.tsx for "Product listings, orders, checkout for engraved goods"; do not create a parallel component.
- proof-approval-artifact: component supabase/migrations/20251228002319_create_product_mockups.sql - Extend supabase/migrations/20251228002319_create_product_mockups.sql for "Customer approves the design proof before production; immutable approval proof"; do not create a parallel component.
- design-studio: component src/components/CanvasToolbar.tsx - Extend src/components/CanvasToolbar.tsx for "Canvas design upload and mockups"; do not create a parallel component.
- design-studio: component ASSET_UPLOAD_GUIDE.md - Extend ASSET_UPLOAD_GUIDE.md for "Canvas design upload and mockups"; do not create a parallel component.

## Findings
- none

## Forbidden side doors
- new CRM or member-management app
- new visitor route or table that duplicates an existing capture surface
- duplicate admin list parallel to the existing inbox
- member portal
